metadata.description: PancakeSwap-specific AI tools (skills, plugins, agents) for developers and AI agents integrating the PancakeSwap ecosystem.

plugins.name: pancakeswap-trading
plugins.description: Integrate PancakeSwap swaps via Smart Router SDK, Universal Router, and direct contract calls

plugins.name: pancakeswap-driver
plugins.description: AI-powered assistance for discovering tokens, planning swaps, and planning liquidity positions with deep links

plugins.name: pancakeswap-infinity
plugins.description: Security-first AI tools for PancakeSwap Infinity (v4) hook development — threat models, audit checklists, and base templates
